caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap and a black hooded sweatshirt with gold lettering that reads "BOSS TALK" sits in a studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a desk featuring a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black mug with red text that reads "BOSS TALK OUT". To his left is a white backdrop with a repeated logo consisting of five stars and the words "UNCOMMON HUSTLE". Above him, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". The man is captured in a side profile, looking toward the left of the frame. Across the sequence, he remains in a nearly static position, though he slightly shifts his head and gaze. A small circular logo with a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene.
